title: [codereview-pass2] coap_dtn.c: missing #include <zephyr/net/net_ip.h> or sockaddr_in6 cast for IID extraction in rate limit
description: To compute slot from addr for per-IID, needs cast to sockaddr_in6 and access sin6_addr. Current edit doesn't update the if conditions. Security: untrusted addr_len check needed. P1.
